topic: pgvector: Vector similarity search trong PostgreSQL cho AI applications
summary: pgvector extension cho PostgreSQL: lưu và tìm kiếm vector embeddings. Cosine similarity, L2 distance, inner product. IVFFlat và HNSW indexes cho approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) search. Không cần Pinecone hay Weaviate cho basic use cases.
problem: Semantic search, recommendation system, RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation): cần tìm vectors gần nhất trong không gian embedding 1536+ dimensions. Brute force O(n) quá chậm với 1M+ vectors.
solution: pgvector với HNSW index: approximate nearest neighbor search O(log n). Kết hợp metadata filtering với SQL WHERE. Hybrid search: keyword + semantic.
codeExample:
-- Enable extension
CREATE EXTENSION vector;

-- Bảng với vector column
CREATE TABLE documents (
    id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    content TEXT,
    embedding vector(1536),   -- OpenAI ada-002 dimension
    metadata JSONB,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- HNSW index (tốt hơn IVFFlat cho recall và build time)
CREATE INDEX idx_docs_embedding_hnsw ON documents
    USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops)
    WITH (m = 16, ef_construction = 64);

-- Semantic search: tìm 5 documents gần nhất
SELECT id, content, 1 - (embedding <=> @queryVector) AS similarity
FROM documents
WHERE metadata->>'category' = 'technical'   -- metadata filter
ORDER BY embedding <=> @queryVector          -- cosine distance
LIMIT 5;

-- C# với Npgsql
var results = await db.Documents
    .Where(d => d.Metadata != null && (string)d.Metadata["category"]! == "technical")
    .OrderBy(d => EF.Functions.Distance(d.Embedding, queryVector))
    .Take(5)
    .ToListAsync();

-- Hybrid search: keyword + semantic reranking
WITH semantic AS (
    SELECT id, content, 1 - (embedding <=> @vec) AS sem_score
    FROM documents WHERE embedding <=> @vec < 0.3  -- cosine distance threshold
    ORDER BY embedding <=> @vec LIMIT 50
),
keyword_filtered AS (
    SELECT id FROM semantic WHERE content @@ to_tsquery(@keywords)
)
SELECT s.*, ts_rank(to_tsvector(s.content), to_tsquery(@keywords)) AS text_score
FROM semantic s JOIN keyword_filtered k USING (id)
ORDER BY sem_score * 0.7 + text_score * 0.3 DESC LIMIT 5;
tradeoffs: HNSW index: build time lâu (vài phút cho 1M vectors), recall ~95% không phải 100%
pgvector vs Pinecone: pgvector đơn giản hơn nhưng không scale tốt bằng managed vector DB > 10M vectors
Dimension: 1536 dims (OpenAI ada) = 6KB per vector, 1M docs = 6GB chỉ cho embeddings
m=16, ef_construction=64: recall/build time trade-off; tăng m và ef_construction để tăng recall nhưng chậm hơn

selfVerification.method: Verify recall: compare ANN vs exact search kết quả cho 100 queries
